titleStmt.title: SII 28.292: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 292. (A.R. No. 446 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Karivaradarāja-Perumāḷ temple, central shrine, north base.

Records an order of Vāṇakōvaraiyaṉ addressed to tiruvaḍi-ppiḍippār, śrībhaṇḍārigaḷ and śrī-vaishṇava-kkaṇkāṇi-cheyvār of the temple of Kariya-perumāḷ of Āragaḷūr with regard to the tirunāmatti-kkāṇi of 3170(3/4) kuḻi of wet land and 7115 kuḻi of karai-ppuñchēy land (dry crop land on the outskirts ?) and 14 Iluppai trees and one mango tree, in the kāṇippaṟṟu (land that can be allotted for services to servants ?) adjacent to the channel in Kāśāṟaṉpaṭṭu alias Jayadhara chcharuppēdimaṅgalam, a tax-free tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam of the above said God, allotted in several individuals who however were not managing the lands and making the due contributions to the temple. Now, those lands were disposed as vīramāgadha-pperuvilai and 33, 254 kāśu was collected at the rate of 6 kāśu (per kuḻi) of wet land and 2 kāśu per kuḻi of karai-ppuñchey land. These proceeds were taken into his treasury (charakku) by the chief ?)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vāṇakovaraiyaṉ Olai . Āṟakaḷuril kariyaperumāḷ koyil tiruvaṭippiṭippārum śrīpaṇṭārikaḷum śrīvaiṣṇavak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum kaṇ
ṭu Ivvemperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa Iṟaiyili kācāṟaṉ paṭṭāṉa ceyataraccaruppetimaṅkalattu kālvaḻi kāṇippaṟṟu Entalilum karaip puṉceyilu
m mātuyātatittāṉ Aṉupavitta per peri celvanampi paṟṟu karaippuṉcey kuḻi Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Aṟupattu Oṉṟe kāl Iṉṉilattu Iluppai māmaramum
naṉcey kuḻi Eḻunūṟṟu Aṟupattāṟu Āṭkoḷavantāṉ perumāṉ paṟṟu naṉcey kuḻi nūṟu Āka naṉcey kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Eḻupattāṟu karaippuṉ
cey kuḻi Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Aṟupattu Oṉṟekāl Iluppai māmaramum Araṅkaṉ Aṉupavitta cāpotillai nāyakanampipaṟṟu naṉcey kuḻi nānūṟṟu nāṟpat
teḻarai karaippuṉcey kuḻi Aññūṟṟu Eḻupattoṉṟu cāpo periyanāyanampi paṟṟuk kuḻi nūṟṟu muppatekāl Āka naṉcey kuḻi Aññūṟṟu Eḻupatteḻemukkā
karaip puṉcey kuḻi Aññūṟṟu Eḻupattoṉpatu tevapperumāḷ Aṉupavitta cāpo tirukkāmīcuramuṭaiyāṉ paṟṟu naṉcey kuḻi Irunūṟṟu
Eṇpatu karaippuṉcey kuḻi Irunūṟṟuttoṇṇūṟu cāpo tillaināyakanampi paṟṟuk karaip puṉcey kuḻi Eṇpattu nālu Āka naṉcey kuḻi Irunū
ṟṟu Eṇpatu karaippuṉcey kuḻi muṉṉūṟṟu Eḻupattu nālu vicalūrilirukkum brāhmaṇaril tirukkāmaṉ Aṉupavitta cāpo cāntaṉuṭaiyāṉ pa
ṟṟu naṉcey kuḻi nāṉūṟṟorupattu Añcekāl karaip puṉcey kuḻi Āyirattaṟunūṟṟu Aṟupattu nālemukkāl Iṉṉilattu Iluppai māmaramum coti A
ṉupavitta cāpo tillaināyaka nampi paṟṟu naṉcey kuḻi nūṟṟu Aṟupattāṟu karaip puṉcey kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Āṟarai cāpo Aṇukka nampi paṟṟu naṉcey
kuḻi nūṟṟorupattoṉṟekāl cāpo vaṇṭuvarāpati nampi paṟṟu naṉcey kuḻi muṉṉūṟṟu muppattu nāle kāl cāpo ciṅkapperumāḷ paṟṟu karaip pu
ṉcey kuḻi toḷāyirattu Irupattu Eḻarai Iṉṉilattu Iluppai māmaramum naṉcey kuḻi Aṟunūṟṟu Orupattu Oṉṟarai karaip puṉcey kuḻi Āyira
ttu Eṇṇuṟṟu Irupattu nālu Iluppai māmaramum Uṭaiyāṉ Aṉupavitta cāpo poṉṉampala nampi paṟṟu naṉcey kuḻi nāṉūṟṟorupa
te kāl karaippuṉcey kuḻi Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟorupattiraṇṭu Āka naṉcey kuḻi muvāyirattu Orunūṟṟu Eḻupate mukkāl karaippuṉcey kuḻi
Eḻāyirattu Oru nūṟṟorupattu Añcu Iṉṉilattu Iluppai māmaram patiṉālum mā Oṉṟum Intak kāṇiyāḷar pakkal Ivarkaḷ koṇṭuṭaiyarkaḷāy Aṉupaviyā
maiyil Inta naṉcey nilam kuḻi muvāyirattoru nūṟṟeḻupate mukkāl karaip puṉcey kuḻi Eḻāyirattorunūṟṟorupattu Añcu Ilup
pai maram patiṉālum mā Oṉṟum nālāvatu paṅkūṉi mātattu paṉṉiraṇṭān tiyati mutal Ivvemperumāṉukkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyākak koṇṭu viramā
katap peruvilaiyāka Oṉṟukku k kācu Āṟākik kācu pattoṉ patiṉāyirattirupattunālu karaippuṉceykku Iluppai maramum Uṭpaṭa kuḻikkuk kācu I
raṇṭākak kācu patiṉālāyirattu Irunūṟṟu muppatu Ākakkācu muppattu muvāyirattirunūṟṟu Aimpattu nālum nam cākkil Oṭukki Intak kāṇi
ppaṟṟu naṉcey kuḻi muvāyirattoru nūṟṟeḻupate mukkālum karaippuṉcey kuḻi Eḻāyirattorunūṟṟorupattu Añcum Iṉṉilattu Iluppai maram patiṉālum mā Oṉṟum Ivvemperumāṉu
cantirātiRead cantirātittatavaraiyum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy vilaiyum Oṟṟiyuñ cellakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyvate Ivai vāṇakovaraiyar Eḻuttu Ivai tāyilu nalla brahmārāyar Eḻuttu ḥ §
Digital edition of SII 28.292 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
